meta.title: HKMT Solutions — IT Consulting & Solutions in Luxembourg
meta.description: HKMT Solutions supports businesses and individuals in the design, development and security of their information systems in Luxembourg.

hero.title: Technology in the service of your ambitions
hero.text: HKMT Solutions supports businesses and individuals in the design, development and security of their information systems — from consulting to operations, with attentiveness and proximity.

items.title: IT Consulting & Audit
items.text: Analysis, audit and design of your information systems and technology infrastructures.

items.title: Software Development
items.text: Development, integration and maintenance of custom software, applications and digital solutions.

items.title: Cybersecurity
items.text: Protection of your systems and secure management of your data, according to the best standards.

items.title: Cloud Computing
items.text: Migration, hosting and operation of your infrastructures in the cloud, with complete reliability.

items.title: AI & Digital Transformation
items.text: Artificial intelligence and end-to-end support for your digital transformation.

items.title: Training & Support
items.text: Training your teams and ongoing technical support across all our areas of expertise.

about.title: A Luxembourg company, close to its clients
about.text1: Based in the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg, HKMT Solutions was born from a simple conviction: the best technological solutions come from attentive listening, guided by wisdom.
about.text2: We favour lasting relationships, clear language and pragmatic solutions — for businesses and individuals alike.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.text: A project, a question, an audit need? Write to us, we'll get back to you quickly.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or need...
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at info@hkmt.lu.

errors.emailInvalid: The email format is not valid.
errors.messageTooShort: Your message must be at least 10 characters long.
